utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hi .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Are you all right ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Uhh ... I think I just got engaged .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh my God ! He did it ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well ... did you know he was gonna ask me ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_did you know he was gonna ask me ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Are you kidding ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_did you know he was gonna ask me ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am like the one who talked him into it .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I am like the one who talked him into it .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I like to think of myself as the puppet master of the group .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I like to think of myself as the puppet master of the group .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And you really think this is a good idea ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_you really think this is a good idea ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I just talked him into it , do not tell me I have to do you too . The puppet master gets tired people .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I just talked him into it , do not tell me I have to do you too .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I just do not know ! It just does not feel right .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Why ? ! You two are so meant to be together , everybody thinks so .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Really ? ! Even Ross ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Especially Ross !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh uh , hey Pheebs . Uh you know what ? I will ... I will come back later .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wow ! Kind of uh , kind of a full house here . I will guess just ... I will come back .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: There he goes , your fiancée .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I guess so .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Although he does play with himself in his sleep .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I can not say that I am surprised .
